{"id":1574,"date":"2016-10-03T18:45:22","date_gmt":"2016-10-03T18:45:22","guid":{"rendered":"https://quantumsf.org/?page_id=1574"},"modified":"2025-07-27T13:18:02","modified_gmt":"2025-07-27T20:18:02","slug":"teen-class-schedule","status":"publish","type":"page","link":"https://quantumsf.org/teen-class-schedule/","title":{"rendered":"Teen Class Schedule"},"content":{"rendered":"

All classes are open to all experience levels. Beginners and new students are always welcome, and your first week of classes is free! Please schedule your initial trial class & orientation by filling in this quick form.

Monday: 5:30-6:30pm

Tuesday:       5:30-6:30pm

Tuesday:       6:30-6:45pm (Teen High Green+)

Wednesday: 4:30-5:15pm

Thursday:     5:30-6:30pm

Friday:           5:00–5:30pm (Teen Blue Belt)

Friday:           5:30–6:30pm

Saturday:       11:00-12:00pm

Teens at age 13+ are also invited to any of the Adult level classes, appropriate to their rank.
Teens at rank Blue Belt+ are invited to any of the Adult level classes appropriate to their rank, regardless of their age.

For our latest up-to-date schedule, please consult and subscribe to our Google Calendar:
